2605.25548.title: 'Si'multaneous 'S'patial-'T'emporal Message Passing for Dynamic Graph Representation Learning
2605.25548.paper_summary: Dynamic graph neural networks (DGNNs) that operate on snapshot sequences typically fall into one of two categories. \emph{Temporal-first} approaches build per-node temporal embeddings and only afterwards perform spatial aggregation, whereas \emph{Spatial-first} approaches invert this order, feeding the output of a graph convolution into a downstream temporal module. In either case, the rigid sequencing forces the second stage to consume an already-compressed summary produced by the first, ruling out joint reasoning over topology and evolution; concretely, the message-passing operator never gets to weight a neighbor's contribution by that neighbor's \emph{past} trajectory. This paper introduces \textbf{SiST-GNN} (\textbf{Si}multaneous \textbf{S}patial-\textbf{T}emporal \textbf{GNN}), which fuses the two signals inside a single message-passing operation rather than chaining them. Concretely, at each snapshot we maintain a recurrent hidden state per node that summarises its history, pair it with the node's current feature vector, and treat the pair as two nodes joined by a cross-time edge; running a standard graph convolution on this temporally augmented graph yields the updated representation. Our empirical study spans nine public baselines and fourteen model-dataset combinations, covering both fixed-split and live-update evaluation regimes. Across every public benchmark, SiST-GNN sets a new state of the art in link prediction task over the strongest prior method by $109$--$277\%$ in the fixed-split setting and by $68$--$194\%$ in the live-update setting. We additionally construct three dynamic node-classification tasks by discretising the underlying continuous-time event streams; here SiST-GNN beats the leading discrete-time (DTDG) baseline by $7$--$22\%$ and matches continuous-time (CTDG) methods that consume the raw events directly.
2605.25548.paper_summary_zh: 動態圖神經網絡（DGNNs）在快照序列上運作，通常分為兩類。 \emph{時間優先}的方法首先構建每個節點的時間嵌入，然後再進行空間聚合，而 \emph{空間優先}的方法則顛倒這一順序，將圖卷積的輸出輸入到下游的時間模塊中。在這兩種情況下，僵化的序列化迫使第二階段消耗第一階段產生的已壓縮摘要，排除了對拓撲和演變的聯合推理；具體而言，消息傳遞運算符從未能根據鄰居的 \emph{過去} 軌跡來加權鄰居的貢獻。本文介紹了 \textbf{SiST-GNN}（\textbf{同時} \textbf{空間-} \textbf{時間} \textbf{GNN}），它在單一的消息傳遞操作中融合這兩種信號，而不是將它們鏈接起來。具體而言，在每個快照中，我們為每個節點維持一個遞歸隱藏狀態，以總結其歷史，將其與節點的當前特徵向量配對，並將這對視為由跨時間邊連接的兩個節點；在這個時間增強的圖上運行標準圖卷積會產生更新的表示。我們的實證研究涵蓋九個公共基線和十四個模型-數據集組合，涵蓋固定拆分和實時更新評估模式。在每個公共基準中，SiST-GNN 在鏈接預測任務上相對於最強的先前方法創造了新的最先進技術，在固定拆分設置中提高了 $109$--$277\%$，在實時更新設置中提高了 $68$--$194\%$。此外，我們通過離散化基礎的連續時間事件流來構建三個動態節點分類任務；在這裡，SiST-GNN 超越了領先的離散時間（DTDG）基線 $7$--$22\%$，並與直接消耗原始事件的連續時間（CTDG）方法相匹配。
2605.25548.author: Shubhajit Roy et.al.
